instruction: Please convert a .xlsx file opened in LibreOffice Calc to a .html file and view it in Chrome.

evaluator.eval: is_expected_tabs(get_open_tabs_info(env, config={}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'type': 'url', 'urls': ['https://aclanthology.org/', 'https://openai.com/', 'https://www.linkedin.com/home/', 'file:///home/user/Desktop/annual-enterprise-survey-2021-financial-year-provisional.html']}})) and compare_htmls(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/annual-enterprise-survey-2021-financial-year-provisional.html', 'dest': 'annual-enterprise-survey-2021-financial-year-provisional.html'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/multi_apps/e135df7c-7687-4ac0-a5f0-76b74438b53e/annual-enterprise-survey-2021-financial-year-provisional.html', 'dest': 'annual-enterprise-survey-2021-financial-year-provisional_gold.html'}))
